title: centaurea × santamariae
intro: Centaurea × santamariae, also known as Santamaria's knapweed, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Centaurea genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant capabilities, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × santamariae include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
